Item.DropDeedsOnly: Only Deeds can be dropped here.
Item.DropEffectsStatesOnly: Only Effects or States can be dropped here.
Item.DropArmorOnly: Only Effects and States can be applied to Armor.
Item.DropDeedsOnlyEffects: Only Effects and States can be applied to Deeds.
Item.DropTalentsOnly: Only Talent items can be dropped here.
Item.DropFeaturesOnly: Only Feature items can be dropped here.
Item.DropRationsOnly: Only Effects and States can be applied to Rations.
Item.DropEffectsOnly: Only effects can be dropped here.
Item.NoCallingDrop: Only Talents and Features can be dropped on a Calling.
Item.InvalidTypePossessions: Only Items, Weapons, and Armor can be added to possessions.

Inventory.SlotOccupied: Slot {placement} is already occupied by {name}. Unequip it first.
Inventory.InventoryFull: Inventory full! You must drop an item before you can unequip {name}.
Inventory.InventoryCapReached: Inventory capacity reached. You cannot add more unequipped items.
Inventory.HandsFull: Both hands are occupied. Unequip a weapon first.
Inventory.TwoHandedEquip: You must unequip both hands to equip a Two-Handed weapon.
Inventory.HeavyArmorLimit: You can only have one Heavy armor equipped.

Combat.NoTargetsAbort: No targets selected! Roll aborted, showing basic Accuracy for reference.
Combat.NoTargetsDefault: No targets selected! Rolling against default CD 10.
Combat.NotEnoughAP: You do not have enough Action Points!
Combat.NoWeaponEquipped: No weapon equipped! This ability requires a weapon.
Combat.NeedMeleeWeapon: This ability requires an equipped melee weapon.
Combat.NeedMissileWeapon: This ability requires an equipped missile or thrown weapon.
Combat.NeedSpellWeapon: This ability requires a spell weapon or a free hand.
Combat.NeedFreeHand: This ability requires a free hand.
Combat.NeedWeapon: This ability requires an equipped weapon.
Combat.TargetOutOfRange: {name} is out of range ({distance} sq, max {range}).
Combat.MoveActionRequired: This action requires a Move Action.
Combat.VaultStraightLine: Vaulting requires moving in a straight line.
Combat.TooManyTargets: Too many targets selected ({count}). This ability affects at most {max}.
Combat.NoTokenOnCanvas: No token found on canvas for this actor.
Combat.TemplateTooFar: The template is too far from the caster.
Combat.PathMustStartAdjacent: Path must start adjacent to your token.
Combat.PathMustShareEdge: Each square must share an edge with the previous one.
Combat.PathNoRoute: No valid path to that square within the remaining squares.
Combat.BlastMustBeAdjacent: Close Blast must be adjacent to your token.
Combat.PlaceBlast: Place Blast {size}: click to place, right-click to cancel.
Combat.PlaceCloseBlast: Place Close Blast {size}: click adjacent to your token, right-click to cancel.
Combat.PlacePath: Place Path {size}: click squares to draw path, double-click to confirm, right-click to undo.
Combat.PlaceClosePath: Place Close Path {size}: start adjacent to your token, double-click to confirm, right-click to undo.

Dungeon.NeedsDungeon: This room must be in a Dungeon to add connections.
Dungeon.DropRoomsOnly: Only Room items can be dropped here.
Dungeon.NoActionsRemaining: You have no actions remaining in this round.

Rest.SpendRDLimited: You tried to spend {spent} RD but only have {current}. Spending {current} instead.

Party.DropCharactersOnly: Only character actors can be added to the party.
Party.AlreadyMember: {name} is already a member of the party.

Haven.CharactersOnly: Only character actors can be assigned as leader.
Haven.NoBuildSlots: You have no build slots available (Limit: {max}).
Haven.BuildingLimitReached: You have reached the maximum building limit (Limit: {max}).
Haven.TransferToCharacterOnly: You can only withdraw items to character actors.
Haven.InsufficientFunds: The Haven does not have enough funds ({cost}) to pay all hirelings! Treasury: {treasury}.

Apply.CallingRemoved: Calling '{name}' and associated items removed from {actor}.
